title: crataegus coccinea var. coccinea
intro: Crataegus coccinea var. coccinea, also known as the scarlet hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to eastern North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids, anthocyanins, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to promote heart health, lower blood pressure, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Crataegus coccinea var. coccinea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support cardiovascular health, improve circulation, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular-related disorders.
